creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

The port submission only contained changes to the port Makefile.

Also the distinfo and patches needed modifications to get the update 
going. Please always include the full diff when updating a port.

files/patch-drm_state_upstream is not needed anymore since it is already 
included also.

I'm attaching a revised patch with the missing piece. Can you approve it?

Thanks.

-- 
Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
